## Type of Change / 变更类型

- [ ] Bug fix / 修复
- [ ] New feature / 新功能
- [ ] Performance improvement / 性能优化
- [ ] Code refactoring / 代码重构
- [ ] Documentation update / 文档更新
- [ ] Test update / 测试更新
- [ ] CI/CD or build / CI/CD 或构建
- [ ] Other / 其他:

## How Has This Been Tested? / 如何测试？

- [ ] Unit tests pass / 单元测试通过
- [ ] Manual testing performed / 已完成手动测试
- [ ] Test coverage maintained or improved / 测试覆盖维持或提升

## Checklist / 检查清单

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding style (PEP 8)
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guide
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
